description_long: This is a medium-sized pumpkin with a classic round, ribbed shape and a short, curled brown stem at the top. The pumpkin's surface is predominantly orange, but the front is painted with a vibrant green background and bold, graffiti-style pink letters spelling 'HAPPY HALLOWEEN!' with black splatter accents. The paint appears to be applied in a playful, festive manner, making the pumpkin stand out as a decorative piece. The rest of the pumpkin is unpainted, showing natural orange hues and subtle shading that accentuates its plump segments. The stem is textured and realistically colored, adding to the authenticity of the object. There are no visible cutouts or carvings, and the pumpkin is intact, making it suitable for display in urban festive settings.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a brown stem, featuring a green and pink painted 'HAPPY HALLOWEEN!' message on the front. The rest of the pumpkin is unpainted and natural.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green-painted area with bold pink 'HAPPY HALLOWEEN!' text and black splatter details.
description_view_1: Rear angled view displaying the unpainted orange surface and the curled brown stem, with no visible text.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the natural orange ribbed surface and the stem, with no paint or decorations visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the transition from the painted front to the unpainted orange side, with part of the pink text visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: None. The pumpkin is uncarved but features a painted graffiti-style 'HAPPY HALLOWEEN!' message in pink with black splatter on a green background.
